pr.title: PR #128 — Capability Impact Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the first formal **impact** layer for capabilities — the *meaning* layer on top of identity (Registry #122), memory (Timeline #123), understanding (Summary #125), and relationships (#127). Where relationships provide context, impact answers: what changed, why it matters, and what became possible.

New module `axiom_core/capability_impact.py` follows the same deterministic, append-only, evidence-bundle pattern as #122–#127. It is structure-only — no graph engine/queries/viz/dashboards/twin, no automatic opportunity generation, no network calls. Registry/Summary/Relationship layers are consumed read-only; nothing is mutated.

**Models**
- `CapabilityImpact` (capability_id, impact_type, impact_area, impact_summary, significance, raw_payload, schema_version)
- `CapabilityImpactType` = {ENABLED, IMPROVED, AUTOMATED, SIMPLIFIED, VALIDATED, DOCUMENTED, CONNECTED, EXTENDED}
- `CapabilityImpactArea` = {ENGINEERING, OPERATIONS, KNOWLEDGE, TESTING, WORKERS, GOVERNANCE, ORGANIZATION}
- `CapabilityOpportunity` (title, description, priority, related_capability_ids); priority ∈ {LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, STRATEGIC}
- `CapabilityImpactReport` (impact_count, impact_type_counts, impact_area_counts, opportunity_count, strategic_opportunity_count)
- `CapabilityImpactEvidence` + `CapabilityImpactEngine`

**Determinism / behavior**
- Impacts sorted by `(capability_id, impact_area, impact_type, impact_id)`; opportunities by `(capability_id, title, opportunity_id)` — fully input-independent.
- Impacts are NOT deduplicated (multiple impacts of the same type/area on a capability are legitimate); spec lists duplicate detection only for the relationship layer.
- `strategic_opportunity_count` = count of `priority == STRATEGIC`.
- Types/areas/priorities normalized to uppercase + validated; `capability_id` required on impacts, `capability_id`+`title` required on opportunities; `related_capability_ids` deduped+sorted.
- `pass_fail.json` `passed = impact_count > 0` (an impact report with no impacts fails).

**CLI** (`axiom_cli/main.py`): `capability-impact-create --impact-file` / `capability-impacts` / `capability-impact-show <id>` / `capability-impact-export <id> --format markdown|json|csv`. Rich renderer escapes bracketed tokens so `[AUTOMATED]`/`[STRATEGIC]` render literally. Error paths: not-found → exit 2, traversal/invalid → exit 1.

**Evidence bundle** under `artifacts/capability_impacts/<run_id>/`: `capability_impact_request.json`, `capability_impact_result.json`, `capability_impact_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json` (+ `report.json`).

**Wiring**: registered 4 commands in `runner/command_registry.py` (READ_ONLY/SAFE); added module→test mapping in `test_selection_engine.py`; added the 4 commands to `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`; gitignored the artifacts dir.

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4213 passed, 1 skipped** (+45; baseline 4168 at #127)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**
- CLI smoke: deterministic ordering, type/area counts, strategic-opportunity count, all 3 export formats, not-found→exit 2, traversal→exit 1

Revit 2024 baseline unaffected (Python CLI/framework only).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
